prompt: isometric pixel-art game tiles for a top-down RPG map. Each tile shows a DIFFERENT medium-sized object as the clear MAIN SUBJECT — prominent, detailed and standing tall, on only a small low patch of clear blue water. The object dominates and fills the tile; keep the ground base minimal and thin — NOT a tall dirt pedestal or block with a small object on top. Go for maximum variety — different shapes, species, ages and conditions, no two tiles alike. The set: 1) a tall tuft of pampas grass 2) a wooden rowboat moored to a post 3) a cluster of tall bulrushes 4) a leaning driftwood snag 5) a heron nest atop a snag 6) a small buoy on a chain 7) a bare dead tree rising from the water 8) a stone lantern on a rock 9) a tall stand of reeds and cattails 10) a small rock islet with a bush. cozy hand-crafted top-down RPG pixel art, rich natural texture, cohesive harmonious palette, soft directional shading, high quality game asset, transparent background
